content.en:
Ouyang Jiu'er refused too quickly, making Ye Tian stunned.

Instantly, he reacted.

Half-step Domain Ancestors didn't dare to enter the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and now Ouyang Jiu'er was not a Half-Step Domain Ancestor, just a strong Dao Ancestor, wouldn't entering the Forbidden Zerg Lair look for death?

Therefore, even if there were precious treasures inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair, she would not dare to enter it!

"Jiu'er, listen to me!"

Ye Tian said helplessly: "I have been inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair and have come out, so you can rest assured, I am very sure to save my life!"

"You've been in?"

Ouyang Jiu'er was a little unconvinced.

Immediately, Ye Tian told the story that his clone had entered the forbidden Zerg lair, and also said that he had seen a dark blunt gold vein.

When Ye Tian said that he had a forbidden talent hidden, Ouyang Jiu'er's eyes widened again, and his face was full of incredulity.

"Brother Ye, is your forbidden talent a little too much, and you don't seem to have this forbidden talent before?"

Ouyang Jiu'er was suspicious.

Before, she took Ye Tian to perform the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step, and Ye Tian himself was not very good at concealing methods, which was far from being comparable to the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step.

If at that time, Ye Tian had a forbidden talent to hide, it would be deliberately concealing her.

Thinking of this, Ouyang Jiu'er glared at Ye Tian, waiting for his explanation.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "My body is quite special, every time I break through a realm, I will awaken a talent, so I have a lot of talents!"

He felt that this explanation should be able to fool the past.

"Could it be that you are the son of the taboo?"

Ouyang Jiu'er was shocked.

"What is the Forbidden Child?" Ye Tian was curious.

Ouyang Jiu'er explained: "The so-called Forbidden Son is what we call it, indicating that this kind of person has atmospheric luck, just like the Son of Luck in the Dark Forbidden Domain. Moreover, every time this kind of person breaks through a realm, there is a certain chance of causing a change in the soul, so that there is a certain chance of giving birth to a new talent, and once others are born, the talent is basically fixed, and only by using certain treasures can the talent be increased, but the increased talent is basically very average, and it is the ultimate to be able to increase the Dao-level natal talent. However, the Forbidden Child has the hope that he can give birth to a Dao-level natal talent on his own without the help of task treasures, and even the Forbidden Child! But the Forbidden Child is also a legend in the Divine Heaven Realm, and you are not the same as the Forbidden Child! Legend has it, the Forbidden Child is a natural forbidden body, and as soon as he was born, he had terrifying visions, which caused a great change in the forbidden rules of heaven and earth, but you were originally a creature of the ordinary universe!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that one of the reasons he casually reckoned could be related to the Forbidden Son, so he immediately said: "Jiu'er, how big the Dark Forbidden Domain is, how many realms there are, it is normal for some special physiques to appear and have no way to know them. Let's talk about dark blunt gold, what now?"

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't bother with Ye Tian's physique, pondered for a while, and said, "Brother Ye, the dark blunt gold vein is indeed a part of the residue of the forbidden Zerg refining forbidden strange things, it is garbage for the Forbidden Zerg, and it is a treasure for us. Trying to remove the dark blunt gold vein will inevitably trigger the abandoned outlet of the forbidden zerg lair. Once the dark blunt gold vein is moved, it is equivalent to touching this discharge, and the forbidden zerg nest will naturally have abnormal movements. If you want to take away the Dark Blunt Gold Vein silently, you can only shield the connection between the Forbidden Zerg Lair and the Dark Blunt Gold Vein!"

"How do you disconnect?"

This is Ye Tian's biggest problem at present.

"Let the Forbidden Zerg Lair automatically disconnect!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "You can treat the Dark Blunt Gold Vein as something in the body of a living being, this thing is currently connected to a living being, there is no benefit, but there is no harm either. But if this thing is not good for the forbidden zerg nest, the creature doesn't want to have anything to do with it!"

"How?"

The reason, Ye Tian understands, but how to operate, he still doesn't understand it.

"What are the Forbidden Zerg most afraid of, do you know?" asked Ouyang Jiu'er.

"I don't know!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

He really didn't know what the Forbidden Zerg was afraid of, as if in his impression, the Forbidden Zerg seemed to be not afraid of anything and devoured everything.

"Insects are afraid of birds, and the taboo bugs are naturally not afraid of ordinary birds, but they are afraid of the forbidden creatures of birds! I happen to have a drop of the ordinary blood of the forbidden creature Tai Ewu in my hand, this drop of blood does not contain much power, but its value is very precious. Of course, compared to the dark blunt gold, this drop of blood is ordinary. Moreover, if I can take away the Dark Blunt Gold, I can refine a little bit of Taieu's blood from the veins again. "

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"So, you use it to enter the Forbidden Zerg Lair?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course you don't have to go in!" Ouyang Jiu'er rolled her eyes, "Your doppelganger will fall casually, I don't want to fall! Even if your forbidden talent is very clever, if it is discovered by the lord-level forbidden zerg, it will be over!"

Afterwards, Ouyang Jiu'er gave Ye Tian the sealing ball that sealed the blood of Tai Eu Wu, with a reluctant face.

"Brother Ye, be careful, don't worry about the fall of your clone, don't lose this drop of Tai'er Wu blood!" Ouyang Jiu'er admonished.

"Don't worry!"

Ye Tian assured.

After taking this drop of Tai'ewu blood, Ye Tian left the Jiuhe base.

Subsequently, he asked the replica body to take this drop of Tai'ewu blood to cast the forbidden talent hidden and go to the forbidden zerg lair.

-----------------

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Forbidden Zerg lair again, and cautiously flew in through a passage.

There was no problem this time, but I had close contact with a few batches of Forbidden Zerg, but I didn't encounter a lord-level Forbidden Zerg, so I didn't find out.

Finally, Ye Tian came to the place where the dark blunt gold vein was located again.

"It depends on whether this drop of Tai'ewu blood has any effect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He crushed the sealing orb, and a drop of Taieu's blood dripped into the dark blunt gold vein.

It seemed that there was only a drop of blood, but it fell into the dark blunt gold vein, and soon dyed the black dark blunt gold vein into a blood-colored color, and wisps of blood-colored rules diffused, affecting the vortex above the vein.

Suddenly.

The vortex vibrate, and it seemed that he didn't like this breath very much, but he was not afraid, after all, just a drop of blood could not threaten the forbidden zerg nest.

Click!

The sound of breaking sounded in the dark, and the vortex really took the initiative to disconnect from the Dark Blunt Gold Vein, and seemed to dislike the Dark Blunt Gold Vein very much.

"Close!"

Ye Tian seized the opportunity and quickly incorporated the Dark Blunt Gold Vein into the inner world.
